# Testimonial Request Template

Subject: Request for SealRun deployment testimonial

Hello `<Name>`,

Thank you for partnering with us on your SealRun deployment. We would like to request a short testimonial covering:

1. Your initial challenge before SealRun
2. What changed after adopting deterministic replay/governance workflows
3. Measurable outcomes (speed, reliability, audit readiness)

If approved, we can publish this as:
- Anonymous quote
- Named quote with title
- Short case-study excerpt

Thank you for considering this.
